issue_title: autodoc: NameError with autoproperty and `if TYPE_CHECKING:`
issue_body:
### Describe the bug

```
Running Sphinx v9.0.0rc1
loading translations [en]... done
making output directory... done
WARNING: html_static_path entry '_static' does not exist
building [mo]: targets for 0 po files that are out of date
writing output... 
building [html]: targets for 11 source files that are out of date
updating environment: [new config] 11 added, 0 changed, 0 removed
WARNING: error while formatting arguments for slate_core.Array.as_type: name 'Ctype' is not defined [autodoc]
WARNING: error while formatting signature for slate_core.Array.as_type: name 'Ctype' is not defined [autodoc]
WARNING: error while formatting arguments for slate_core.Array.from_array: name 'Ctype' is not defined [autodoc]
WARNING: error while formatting signature for slate_core.Array.from_array: name 'Ctype' is not defined [autodoc]
```

Versions
========

* Platform:         linux; (Linux-6.17.8-arch1-1-x86_64-with-glibc2.31)
* Python version:   3.14.0 (CPython)
* Sphinx version:   9.0.0rc1
* Docutils version: 0.21.2
* Jinja2 version:   3.1.6
* Pygments version: 2.19.2

Last Messages
=============

```
    index

    reading sources... [ 18%]
    modules

    reading sources... [ 27%]
    slate_core
```

Loaded Extensions
=================

* sphinx.ext.mathjax (9.0.0rc1)
* alabaster (1.0.0)
* sphinxcontrib.applehelp (2.0.0)
* sphinxcontrib.devhelp (2.0.0)
* sphinxcontrib.htmlhelp (2.1.0)
* sphinxcontrib.serializinghtml (2.0.0)
* sphinxcontrib.qthelp (2.0.0)
* sphinx.ext.autodoc (9.0.0rc1)
* pydata_sphinx_theme (unknown version)

Traceback
=========

```pytb
      File "/workspaces/slate/slate_core/metadata/_metadata.py", line 22, in __annotate__
        def fundamental_shape(self) -> NestedLength:
                                       ^^^^^^^^^^^^
    NameError: name 'NestedLength' is not defined
```

The full traceback has been saved in:
/tmp/sphinx-err-da4g84la.log

To report this error to the developers, please open an issue at <https://github.com/sphinx-doc/sphinx/issues/>. Thanks!
Please also report this if it was a user error, so that a better error message can be provided next time.
make: *** [Makefile:20: html] Error 2

### How to Reproduce

clone slate

https://github.com/Matt-Ord/slate

```
uv run sphinx-apidoc --force --module-first -o docs/source/ slate_core/
cd docs
make html
```

### Environment Information

```text
Platform:              linux; (Linux-6.17.8-arch1-1-x86_64-with-glibc2.36)
Python version:        3.14.0 (main, Nov 19 2025, 22:48:15) [Clang 21.1.4 ])
Python implementation: CPython
Sphinx version:        9.0.0rc1
Docutils version:      0.21.2
Jinja2 version:        3.1.6
Pygments version:      2.19.2
```

### Sphinx extensions

```python

```
